channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists just captured a mysterious quantum “dance” inside superconductors
item.description: In a breakthrough experiment, scientists directly imaged how particles pair up in a system that mimics superconductors. Instead of behaving independen...

item.title: This tiny mammal survived the dinosaur apocalypse and changed life on Earth
item.description: A newly discovered prehistoric mammal may hold clues to how life survived the dinosaur-killing extinction. The tiny species, Cimolodon desosai, lived ...

item.title: Students build a “cosmic radio” to listen for dark matter
item.description: A group of undergraduate students pulled off something remarkable: they built their own dark matter detector and used it to probe one of physics’ bigg...

item.title: Scientists finally solve mystery of strange “golden orb” found 2 miles deep
item.description: A mysterious “golden orb” found more than two miles deep in the Gulf of Alaska left scientists baffled for over two years, sparking wild speculation a...
